access_status.notes: All modes fail. requests: SSL UNEXPECTED_EOF_WHILE_READING. curl_cffi: TLS connect error. browser: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED. TLS handshake fails on all modes.

difficulty_signals.evidence: SSL UNEXPECTED_EOF_WHILE_READING on requests, TLS connect error on curl_cffi, ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on browser
difficulty_signals.impact: Cannot establish HTTPS connection at all
difficulty_signals.suggested_handling: Site may be down or blocking via TLS fingerprinting. Try proxy or check if domain is active.

recommended_action_plan.reason: TLS error on all modes - site may be defunct or geo-blocked
